project_type: Next.js 16 full-stack app with TypeScript, Prisma ORM, SQLite database
build_system: npm with Next.js build pipeline. No Dockerfile. Prisma uses driver adapter (PrismaBetterSqlite3)
test_framework: No test framework currently installed. Validation via build (next build) and lint (eslint)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to ensure all dependencies resolve. 2. Run npx prisma generate to regenerate Prisma client. 3. Run npx prisma db push to apply schema changes. 4. Run npm run build to confirm Next.js compiles without errors. 5. Run npm run lint to check code quality.
snapshot_or_generated_files: Prisma client is generated via npx prisma generate. node_modules/.prisma/client is the output. Not checked in.
setup_instructions: npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm access. Node.js v22 available. No Docker needed. SQLite only (no PostgreSQL). LLM provider keys configured via env vars (OPENAI_API_KEY). No test framework installed - rely on build + lint for verification.
contribution_requirements: Use Bahasa Indonesia for UI labels/descriptions. Follow existing patterns: Next.js API routes with NextRequest/NextResponse, Prisma for DB, components in co-located components/ folders. Commit messages use conventional commits (feat:, fix:, etc.).
key_patterns: API routes: src/app/api/<resource>/route.ts with GET/POST exports. Prisma singleton at src/lib/prisma.ts using PrismaBetterSqlite3 adapter. Agent Guard at src/lib/agent-guard/ with processInput/processOutput functions. All models defined in prisma/schema.prisma with SQLite provider. Error responses in Indonesian.
directory_structure: src/app/(dashboard)/ - UI pages. src/app/api/ - API routes. src/lib/ - shared utilities. src/lib/agent-guard/ - security system. src/components/ui/ - shadcn/ui components. prisma/ - schema and seed. scripts/guard/ - polyglot guard scripts.
